## hi, its quote.
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>quote.com</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    html, body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      background: #000;
      color: #e0e0e0;
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    body::before {
      content: '';
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 50% -10%, rgba(100,20,180,0.10) 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 50% at 85% 90%, rgba(60,0,100,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%);
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 0;
    }

    .card {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      width: min(390px, 94vw);
      background: #060606;
      border: 1px solid #161616;
      border-radius: 22px;
      padding: 38px 28px 28px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 20px;
      box-shadow:
        0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.02),
        0 0 80px rgba(100,20,180,0.07),
        0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
      animation: rise 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
    }

    @keyframes rise {
      from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(22px); }
      to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    }

    .avatar-wrap { position: relative; }

    .avatar {
      width: 100px;
      height: 100px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      object-fit: cover;
      display: block;
      border: 1px solid #1e1e1e;
    }

    .avatar-ring {
      position: absolute;
      inset: -5px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, #2a005a, #7b2fff, #1a0040, #5b00cc, #2a005a);
      z-index: -1;
      animation: spin 8s linear infinite;
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    @keyframes spin {
      to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }

    .avatar-ring::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 5px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #060606;
    }

    .name {
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #ececec;
      letter-spacing: -0.01em;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .status {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      margin-top: 4px;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .dot {
      width: 7px;
      height: 7px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #3ba55d;
      animation: pulse 2.5s infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse {
      0%,100% { opacity:1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(59,165,93,0.4); }
      50% { opacity:0.7; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(59,165,93,0); }
    }

    .status-text {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: #3ba55d;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 400;
    }

    .quote-box {
      width: 100%;
      padding: 15px 18px;
      background: #090909;
      border: 1px solid #141414;
      border-radius: 12px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .quote-text {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: #666;
      line-height: 1.7;
      font-style: italic;
      min-height: 3em;
    }

    .cursor {
      display: inline-block;
      width: 1.5px;
      height: 0.85em;
      background: #444;
      margin-left: 1px;
      vertical-align: text-bottom;
      animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
    }

    @keyframes blink {
      0%,100% { opacity:1; }
      50% { opacity:0; }
    }

    .discord-btn {
      width: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      padding: 14px 18px;
      background: #090909;
      border: 1px solid #161616;
      border-radius: 12px;
      color: #aaa;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.86rem;
      font-weight: 400;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .discord-btn:hover {
      border-color: #5865F2;
      background: rgba(88,101,242,0.08);
      color: #fff;
    }

    .discord-btn:hover .d-arrow {
      color: #5865F2;
      transform: translateX(4px);
    }

    .d-label { flex: 1; }

    .d-arrow {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #2a2a2a;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .footer {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      color: #222;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="card">

  <div class="avatar-wrap">
    <div class="avatar-ring"></div>
    <img class="avatar" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="avatar"/>
  </div>

  <div>
    <div class="name">quote.com</div>
    <div class="status">
      <div class="dot"></div>
      <span class="status-text">en ligne</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="quote-box">
    <div class="quote-text" id="qt"><span class="cursor"></span></div>
  </div>

  <a href="https://discord.com/users/quote.com" class="discord-btn">
    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#5865F2">
      <path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057a.082.082 0 0 0 .031.057 19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.993 3.03.078.078 0 0 0 .084-.028c.462-.63.874-1.295 1.226-1.994a.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03zM8.02 15.33c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.956-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.956 2.418-2.157 2.418zm7.975 0c-1.183 0-2.157-1.085-2.157-2.419 0-1.333.955-2.419 2.157-2.419 1.21 0 2.176 1.096 2.157 2.42 0 1.333-.946 2.418-2.157 2.418z"/>
    </svg>
    <span class="d-label">quote.com</span>
    <span class="d-arrow">→</span>
  </a>

  <div class="footer">quote.com</div>

</div>
<script>
  const quotes = [
    "Dans l'obscurité, même une étincelle devient étoile.",
    "Ce que tu cherches te cherche aussi.",
    "Le silence parle plus fort que les mots.",
    "Chaque fin est le début de quelque chose d'inconnu.",
    "L'ombre n'existe que grâce à la lumière.",
  ];

  let qi=0, ci=0, del=false, wait=false;
  const el = document.getElementById('qt');
  const cur = '<span class="cursor"></span>';

  function type() {
    if (wait) return;
    const q = quotes[qi];
    if (!del) {
      ci++;
      el.innerHTML = q.slice(0,ci) + cur;
      if (ci === q.length) {
        wait = true;
        setTimeout(()=>{ del=true; wait=false; type(); }, 3000);
      } else setTimeout(type, 44);
    } else {
      ci--;
      el.innerHTML = q.slice(0,ci) + cur;
      if (ci === 0) {
        del=false;
        qi=(qi+1)%quotes.length;
        setTimeout(type, 500);
      } else setTimeout(type, 20);
    }
  }
  setTimeout(type, 700);
</script>
</body>
</html>
